Chronology of every recorded fact about [[void key]], in reading order. Generated from the same verified fact store as the main article.

== Ghostwater ==
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-05-ghostwater|'''Ch 4''' — A void key might contain treasures from Akura Malice.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-05-ghostwater|'''Ch 11''' — A void key contains a private space accessible only by the holder.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-05-ghostwater|'''Ch 11''' — Sages are the weakest beings capable of creating void keys.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-05-ghostwater|'''Ch 13''' — Lindon stores Carp steaks in his void key.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-05-ghostwater|'''Ch 14''' — Mercy has a void key.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-05-ghostwater|'''Ch 15''' — Lindon has a void key.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-05-ghostwater|'''Ch 16''' — Lindon uses a void key to access void storage.}}

== Underlord ==
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-06-underlord|'''Ch 5''' — Eithan can pull a chair from his void key.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-06-underlord|'''Ch 5''' — Eithan uses a void key to store and retrieve items.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-06-underlord|'''Ch 8''' — Lindon reaches for his void key.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-06-underlord|'''Ch 10''' — Mercy used a void key to settle Little Blue.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-06-underlord|'''Ch 21''' — A void key can be the size of a barn.}}

== Uncrowned ==
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-07-uncrowned|'''Ch 3''' — Lindon stores items such as restoration pills, firewood, water jugs, travel rations, a steel knife, and a travel blanket in his void key.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-07-uncrowned|'''Ch 7''' — Constructs can be stored using a void key.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-07-uncrowned|'''Ch 10''' — Pride uses a void key to unload his belongings.}}

== Wintersteel ==
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-08-wintersteel|'''Ch 1''' — Adama does not carry a void key.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-08-wintersteel|'''Ch 7''' — A void key opened in the center of the room.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-08-wintersteel|'''Ch 9''' — Charity reaches into a shadowy void key to pull out a chair.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-08-wintersteel|'''Ch 9''' — Lindon can pull items from his void key.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-08-wintersteel|'''Ch 11''' — A void key can be used to contain a cloudship.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-08-wintersteel|'''Ch 14''' — Lindon used a void key to store his armor plates.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-08-wintersteel|'''Ch 16''' — Mercy carries a void key around her neck.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-08-wintersteel|'''Ch 20''' — Charity has a void key.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-08-wintersteel|'''Ch 27''' — Lindon's void key slid open.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-08-wintersteel|'''Ch 28''' — Lindon plucked a void key from around Sophara's neck.}}

== Bloodline ==
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-09-bloodline|'''Ch 3''' — Akura Charity pulled a scripted spike from a void key.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-09-bloodline|'''Ch 4''' — Charity's void key can produce weapons and shields.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-09-bloodline|'''Ch 6''' — Lindon was pinching his void key.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-09-bloodline|'''Ch 19''' — The void key is a storage space.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-09-bloodline|'''Ch 22''' — Lindon perceived an indentation in space as a sealed void key.}}

== Reaper ==
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-10-reaper|'''Ch 3''' — Yerin has a void key that is not large enough to hold everything.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-10-reaper|'''Ch 4''' — Ziel uses a void key for storage.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-10-reaper|'''Ch 5''' — Lindon uses a void key to summon a Thousand-Mile Cloud.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-10-reaper|'''Ch 6''' — Orthos can be kept in Lindon's void key while flying.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-10-reaper|'''Ch 13''' — Yerin has a void key that she can force open.}}

== Dreadgod ==
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-11-dreadgod|'''Ch 5''' — Lindon has scripted boxes in his void key.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-11-dreadgod|'''Ch 7''' — Orthos has a void key dangling from his neck.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-11-dreadgod|'''Ch 7''' — A void key can hold items like a hammer and shield.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-11-dreadgod|'''Ch 10''' — The plans are likely in a restricted void key.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-11-dreadgod|'''Ch 12''' — Mercy reached into her void key.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-11-dreadgod|'''Ch 14''' — Kahn Mala can use a void key to retrieve objects.}}

== Waybound ==
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-12-waybound|'''Ch 3''' — Orthos has a void key.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-12-waybound|'''Ch 6''' — Lindon tossed Penance arrows into his void key.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-12-waybound|'''Ch 7''' — Ziel could not open his void key while inside the Array.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-12-waybound|'''Ch 12''' — Yerin uses a void key to release Underlord Remnants.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-12-waybound|'''Ch 12''' — A void key opened near Orthos.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-12-waybound|'''Ch 13''' — A void key can contain Archlord-level natural treasures.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-12-waybound|'''Ch 14''' — Ziel intends to keep the Sage's Remnant in his void key.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-12-waybound|'''Ch 31''' — Emriss has a gemstone that feels like a very deep void key.}}

[[Category:Timelines]]
